case_title: CHUNG, RONNIE VS ZHUO, HONG LI

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ZHUO, HONG LI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHUNG, RONNIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZHUO, HONG LI $1,133.23 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,208.23, THE JUDGEMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF $633.23 FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE; AND $500 FOR BODILY INJURIES. ANY PAYMENTS PREVIOUSLY TENDERED ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE SHALL BE DEDUCTED TO THE JUDGMENT. (DEFENDANT'S NAME IS CORRECTED TO ZHUP HONG LI) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CHUNG, RONNIE AS TO DEFENDANT ZHUO, HONG LI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ZHUO, HONG LI
